title: cotoneaster microphyllus var. buxifolius
intro: Cotoneaster microphyllus var. buxifolius, also known as the Dwarf Bux Cotoneaster, is a deciduous shrub native to China, belonging to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Cotoneaster microphyllus var. buxifolius include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting immune function. It can be prepared as a decoction, tea, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
